title: lithocarpus quangnamensis
intro: Lithocarpus quangnamensis, also known as the Quang Nam Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family. It is native to Vietnam and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. Lithocarpus quangnamensis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
